# Applied AI Works

> AI consulting for service businesses and skilled trades in West Michigan. Practical AI audits, training, and implementation — not enterprise frameworks.

## About

Applied AI Works is owned and operated by Josh Cowen, based in Zeeland, MI. The focus is on service businesses and skilled trades with 5-50 employees: HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, construction, cleaning, and auto repair companies across West Michigan.

Josh has personally used AI to build 80+ projects and save 3,500+ hours of work. The advice comes from a business operator, not a software consultant.

## Services

- **AI Audit ($1,500 flat)**: A 60-90 minute kickoff interview, written workflow analysis, specific tool recommendations with reasoning, a prioritized implementation roadmap with estimated time savings, and a 30-minute debrief call. Delivered in 5-7 business days.
- **Implementation ($300/hr or project rate)**: Building and deploying the automations identified in the audit. Scoped upfront.
- **Monthly Advisor Retainer ($1,500/month)**: Two strategy sessions per month plus async support for ongoing AI strategy.
- **Team Training (per session)**: Hands-on training using real tasks from your business. Not generic demos.

## Who This Is For

Service businesses with repetitive admin tasks: scheduling follow-ups, estimate writing, invoice chasing, customer communications, service call documentation. If your team spends 8-15 hours per week on tasks like these, an audit will almost certainly find automation opportunities that pay back the fee in 6-10 weeks.

## Contact

- Email: josh@appliedaiworks.com

- Location: Zeeland, MI (serving all of West Michigan)
- Discovery call: Free 30-minute call, no commitment
